name: Yaoko Co.,Ltd.
summary: Yaoko Co.,Ltd. operates supermarkets in Japan. The company offers fresh, processed, and delicatessen food products; and housing related products. It also engages in the import and wholesale of food and beverages. As of March 2020, the company operated 178 stores. Yaoko Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1890 and is headquartered in Kawagoe, Japan.
